_publications._publicationTitle: Identification of therapeutic sensitivities in a spheroid drug combination screen of Neurofibromatosis Type I associated High Grade Gliomas

_contextSnippet: We identified 6 synergistic drug combinations across mouse NF1 glioma cell lines: vorinostat+GDC0941, JQ1+trametinib, LY2606368+GDC0941, PTC596, dinaciclib, and bortezomib combinations. Human TM-31 line showed only additive or antagonistic responses.
details: Spheroid drug combination screen across three mouse NF1 glioma lines (17, 5653, 5746) and one human line (TM-31) identified 6 synergistic combinations in mouse lines (top: vorinostat+GDC0941 δ=12.6, JQ1+trametinib δ=12.7, LY2606368+GDC0941 δ=20.6, PTC596-, dinaciclib-, and bortezomib-based combinations); human TM-31 line showed only additive or antagonistic drug responses, highlighting potential species-specific differences in therapeutic sensitivity
